review_title: The best way to transfer and manage documents with clients
description: Pigeon has become a one-stop-shop for me to easily request, send and track everything I need from clients. My entire business process has become a lot easier since I introduced Pigeon to the team. I love that I no longer need to keep track of documents that I need to collect from clients in my head, and scan through my email to confirm that I received the documents. I didn't realize how much a software could help streamline my document collection process.
author: Jordan S.
pros: Automatic reminders means that clients remember to upload documents without me wasting valuable time following up and emailing clients. I can request and even bulk-send documents in just a few seconds. Pigeon is very easy to use and looks significantly better than most document management tools
cons: None that come to my mind. It’s an awesome platform.

description: In my work, I need to send and receive many documents from third parties. My email was way overcluttered and I could not track anything. Then came Pigeon; it totally changed how I did business. Now all client document transfers I have in one, easy-to-track place. Total gamechanger.
author: Josh L.
pros: Pigeon's workflow, from template creation to document retrieval is seamless, intuitive, and revolutionary. It's a wonder nothing like this was on the market before because it totally transformed how I do work in the best way. With ease, I am able to retrieve vital documents from clients without having to hassle them or manually track the progress of each document. This tool will be at the core of my daily routine for a long time.
cons: If I had to change one thing about Pigeon, it would be wanting to be able to change the colors on my home page. I like the colors now, but want to change it to green. Other than that, nothing I didn't like!

review_title: The most efficient document management tool
description: Pigeon is the only platform I've ever seen that lets you request documents in just one step. I don't have to go create folders, copy links to secure portals and write out an email (or copy and paste a template) into an email that my clients don't want to read. Instead, I just load my Pigeon checklist template, add my client contact and send! Pigeon takes care of the rest.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You can put your logo and color scheme on every document request and send. Automatically reminds customers about their outstanding requests (the feature is optional). The most secure process
cons: Occasionally, I'll have an older client who wants to bring the physical documents into my office, or mail them, but this platform works for every other client.

description: If you are looking for a faster, easier and more secure way to exchange documents with your clients, Pigeon is the right choice. I must say that I was inherently skeptical about changing processes since I thought it would be difficult to learn how to operate a new product, but Pigeon made it extremely easy to get started. A few things make Pigeon truly unique among document management platforms. First, you can actually REQUEST documents using an interactive checklist. I can't overstate how much easier this makes requesting and uploading documents for me and my clients. Second, Pigeon's dashboard and email notifications makes tracking everything that you're collecting really intuitive. Finally, the platform truly LOOKS beautiful and professional (not like some of those softwares that look like they were made in the 90's), including your own custom branding. If you think your document collection is good enough as is, you're probably wrong. Give Pigeon a try.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I take online security very seriously, and Pigeon is second-to-none. Pigeon's dashboard helps to keep my business organized. Pigeon has automatic reminders so my clients actually upload documents on time
cons: Hard to think of any really. love the product!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This platform makes my life significantly easier. I used to just keep track of the documents I needed in my head and would honestly forget about a document or two on occasion. Now, I barely even have to think about it. Pigeon takes care of it for me with automatic reminders, status updates and open receipts. My clients love Pigeon too, since it's very easy for them to use and they know that I'm taking their security seriously. At this point, I couldn't imagine running a business without Pigeon.
author: Adam S.
pros: Custom branding that looks really good for client interactions. Many security features including end-to-end encryption and 2FA. Automatic reminders to so I can stop chasing people for documents
cons: Right now there is no backend integrations with my storage platform.

description: I collect MANY documents from my clients. I used to have two assistants help with every step from creating lists of documents I need, to writing emails and following up when clients forget to upload documents, to organizing them once they are sent. Pigeon handles all of this for me now, and I couldn't be happier.
author: Elan A.
pros: Truly 3-clicks to request documents. Includes reminder emails to my clients when they have outstanding documents. Branding
cons: The checklists could use sections headers to differentiate between categories

description: Pigeon has helped my business in a big way. I originally thought that a document collection platform might make my business a bit easier to manage, but it has done so much more than just that. Since I started using Pigeon, more clients come back and refer family and friends.The process of uploading documents used to be a burden for my cleints but it's easier now. I get a lot of feedback from clients that they're happy someone is finally making online security easy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pigeon is the easiest software to use. Makes requesting and sending documents fast. My business looks more professional because of custom branding
cons: No Cons for me, it works great and I wish I had it earlier!

review_title: Best platform for securely sending files
description: Pigeon is easily the best platform I've come across for sending documents. It's extremely secure, very easy to use, and has lots of convenient features. As someone who cares a lot about security and does not like to share documents via insecure methods like Email attachments and Dropbox, Pigeon is exactly what I needed. I love the design of the product, and the simple interface made it easy to pick up and use right away. I would highly recommend using Pigeon for sending or requesting files.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1) Extremely secure platform that puts me at ease when sharing sensitive documents 2) Very efficient, can upload and send in just a few clicks 3) Simple user interface make things easy
cons: Not much really that I can think of. Maybe they could add better thumbnails for the attachments, but that’s a very minor visual thing.

review_title: I recommend Pigeon for your business
description: The first time I saw Pigeon's dashboard I felt a wave of relief. I can't believe other platforms don't have an organized dashboard like Pigeon. With the dashboard you can see every document request you've made and organize it by title, name, last update and its status. With just one scan you can confirm that you have all the documents you need from your clients, and which files are still outstanding. You can even see when clients read your email when you send files. A wonderful platform!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The dashboard relieves so much stress! I love knowing that my brand grows with every Pigeon request/send because of their custom branding feature. No more follow up emails (thanks to their auto-reminders)
cons: No mobile app yet, but your clients can still upload documents from their phone so it's not really a problem

description: Pigeon is a MUST HAVE for any client service business. Without easy, streamlined and secure document collection processes, documents can be forgotten, time gets wasted and running a business is more stressful. Moreover, clients respond positively to a professionalized process (especially one that emphasizes security and lets you highlight your business' brand). If you have fewer than 5 employees, it might not be necessary (depending on how many documents you collect). If you have more than 75 employees, you may already have a propriety internal tool built, but if you don't Pigeon probably makes more sense that spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on engineers. I have been completely satisfied with my purchase. The platform integrated seemlessly with our process after our one month free trial test.
author: Mitchell S.
pros: Pigeon makes high level security EASY. Pigeon keeps me updated with email notifications. Pigeon helps build my brand
cons: I don't think they have a Desktop Application or program
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: If you're in the market for a document request and management platform, look no further. You won't find anything easier, more efficient and cheaper. Plus they give a month long free trial with each of their plans.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Custom branding tools looks great. I get notified when my clients open the files I send them. Bulk document requests and sends
cons: Haven't come across anything yet. So far so good.

review_title: I couldn't run my business without Pigeon
author: julian P.
pros: Clients feel comfortable sending their sensitive information. They always send the documents on time (because of auto-reminders). I love the custom branding option
cons: In today's online business environment, it is so important to have a secure platform. However, in my line of business, clients are often hesitant to get acquainted with new online platforms. That is why Pigeon is so important to my business. Pigeon makes the highest level of security easily accessible to a non technical crowd. Rarely (if ever) do I ever get questions from my clients asking me how to upload their documents, because Pigeon makes it so easy. They receive an email to their inbox, put in the secure code (that is right on the email) and see the checklist listing every document that they need to upload along with any additional instructions. By just dragging and dropping into the checklist, the clients can submit the documents in an extremely efficient and organized manner. They know exactly where to upload what knowing the process is secure. I wish more people knew about Pigeon.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Pigeon is not too complicated and really easy to start using. Exchanging documents with clients shouldn't be complicated and Pigeon simplifies the process. 5 out 5 stars for me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Organized dashboard ease of mind. Intuitive and easy to use and train employees on the software
cons: It would be nice to have thumbnails and previews for the attachments when uploading documents.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Pigeon is a game-changer for businesses that need to collect documents and other information from clients. The process is way easier and more intuitive than things like Citrix ShareFile, Box and Dropbox. I strongly recommend Pigeon!
author: Danielle H.
pros: My logo and color schemes are on the requests which makes clients comfortable and helps with my branding. It takes me just 3 clicks to make requests at this point. No more writing up long emails with a link to my Dropbox! Pigeon's interface is very intuitive and easy to use for businesses and their clients
cons: I couldn't figure out how to upload my contact list but I just sent it to them and they uploaded it for me. The team is very responsive.

description: 100 times better than Citrix ShareFile. I couldn't recommend it more strongly!
author: Rob L.
pros: Checklist/template/tracking tools save me 5-7 hours every week. Very intuitive -.almost never have confused clients or employees . Clearly organizes my clients' documents
cons: Just a personal preference but the document dropzone size is a little too large for my liking

description: After trying out many of the different document mangement platforms, I can confidently say that no tool makes it faster and easier to collect documents than Pigeon. Pigeon saves me at least 3-5 hours every week and also saves me many headaches. I would strongly recommend it to anyone interested in saving time while making their entire business process easier.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I spend way less time on document management because of templates. Auto-reminders help and look professional. The whole process is more organized because of tracking tools and their dashboard
cons: Zero issues. I don't have any problems with the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easiest document management software to use
description: If you don't want to spend months learning and integrating a new product with your team, Pigeon is the tool for you. In addition to making the whole process more efficient, Pigeon is easy to learn and integrate with your team. The Pigeon team was very responsive to any questions we had and even lead a demo for the whole team answering our questions. Overall, I would strongly recommend this product.
author: Charles H.
pros: The checklists help organize document collection. It is the most secure tool on the market. Amazing design.
cons: We did not experience any setbacks with the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Other softwares of this quality cost my business way more each month. Pigeon helps my mid-sized business just as much and it doesn't cost an arm and a leg. If you just test their free trial, I'm sure you'll be a customer before you know it.
author: Sam P.
pros: Clients understand exactly how to use it. Speeds up our process. Keeps clients in the loop with reminders and notifications
cons: None - has everything I need, really no complaints
